cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. So we have five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start. Let me list out the initial pairings again to make sure I have them right. At the beginning: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga Then there are a series of partner switches. Let me go through each one step by step. First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me write that down: After first switch: - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola Others remain the same: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve was with Helga, and Alice is now with Sam. So after switching, Eve will be with Sam, and Alice will be with Helga. After second switch: - Alice: Helga - Eve: Sam Others remain: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Lola Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob was with Karl, Dave was with Lola. After switch, Bob is with Lola, Dave is with Karl. After third switch: - Bob: Lola - Dave: Karl Others: - Alice: Helga - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Sam Fourth switch: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob is currently with Lola, Eve is with Sam. After
